steps.step: Migration: orders.coupon_id generated by drizzle-kit (not hand-written), additive nullable uuid FK, NO ACTION, applies clean
steps.notes: 0007_round_menace.sql: ADD COLUMN coupon_id uuid + ADD CONSTRAINT FK ON DELETE no action. Migrations applied successfully.

steps.step: GET /coupons: own coupons listed newest-first, other users excluded (list-scoping, not 403), 401 without session
steps.notes: Isolation by fixture id; empty list for a user with no coupons.

steps.step: GET /coupons ?status= filter over EFFECTIVE status + read-time expiry relabel (available-but-past-expiry → expired; stored status untouched)
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (coupons.test.ts > status filter + expiry relabel)
steps.notes: available excludes used+effectively-expired; expired includes the relabeled coupon; DB row stays 'available' (no write-back).

steps.step: GET /coupons display-label join (A1a/A1b): reward-linked → '₱50 OFF', deal-linked → '20% OFF' (LEFT JOIN, not N+1)
steps.notes: Non-empty human-readable displayLabel for both link types.

steps.step: POST /coupons/:id/redeem CAS: 200 available→used; 409 already-used; 409 expired (row untouched); 403 not-owner; 404 unknown/malformed; concurrent double-redeem → exactly one 200
steps.notes: Boundary + race cases; used_at set on success; expired coupon never flips to used.

steps.step: AC3: coupon issued from a reward (reward_id set) appears in the owner's list with a label (hermetic fixture insert)
steps.notes: Does not call the live /rewards redeem endpoint — decoupled fixture.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — fixed_discount reward: 500c discount, total 800, coupon_id persisted, coupon marked used
steps.notes: Server-derived from reward_value; clamped to subtotal.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — percentage_discount reward: 20% of 1300 = 260 rounded cents
steps.notes: Math.round applied.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — free_item reward with customized eligible line: discount equals product BASE price (500), NOT the 650 customized line price
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > free_item base price)
steps.notes: Anti-gaming: base price is unambiguous and server-derived regardless of add-on selection.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — free_item reward, eligible product not in cart → 400, no order, coupon stays available
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > free_item absent)
steps.notes: Failure/boundary case; never silently applies a 0 discount.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — deal-issued coupon (deal_id) reuses computeDealDiscountCents; complex deal type → 400, no order
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > deal-issued + complex reject)
steps.notes: Same complex-type rejection as the deal-apply path.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon apply — unrecognized reward_type (varchar, no DB enum) → 400, no order (defensive branch)
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > unrecognized reward_type)
steps.notes: Never falls through to a 0/undefined discount.

steps.step: POST /orders stacking — deal + coupon sum; invariant subtotal - discount_total === total; sum-clamp never exceeds subtotal
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > stacking + stacking clamp)
steps.notes: 260+500=760 (total 540); 260+clamped-1300 → sum-clamped to 1300 (total 0); discount_total <= subtotal always.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon terminal rejections — expired/used/not-owned/unknown couponId → 409/409/403/404, no order
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > terminal rejections)
steps.notes: Boundary/failure cases; countOrdersWithCoupon = 0.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon race — two simultaneous placements with the same couponId → exactly one 201, the other 409; coupon consumed exactly once
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (orders.test.ts > coupon apply > concurrent double-apply)
steps.notes: FOR UPDATE serializes; exactly one order carries the coupon_id, coupon ends 'used'.

steps.step: POST /orders coupon atomicity — a failure after the coupon lock (order-number exhaustion) rolls back the whole tx; coupon stays available
steps.notes: 500 thrown before the CAS mark-used; countOrdersWithCoupon = 0, coupon still 'available'.

steps.step: POST /orders backward-compat — no couponId placement returns couponId null; existing 25 order/deal cases unchanged
steps.notes: Additive optional field; all pre-existing deal/order tests still green.

steps.step: Regression guard — POST /rewards/:id/redeem response shape unchanged (serializeCoupon untouched, no displayLabel)
steps.notes: serializeCoupon signature preserved; only serializeCouponWithLabel is new.

steps.step: Full API suite regression — no failures across auth/staff/admin/branches/deals/orders/rewards/coupons
steps.notes: 189/189 across 17 files (baseline 155 + 18 coupons + 16 new orders coupon-apply).

steps.step: Typecheck / lint / format across the monorepo
steps.command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter @jojopotato/mobile typecheck && pnpm format:check
steps.notes: Root typecheck 6/6 green; lint 7/7 (3 pre-existing unrelated warnings in dev-with-tunnel.mjs); mobile typecheck clean; prettier all-clean.
